title: veronica austriaca var. tenuifolia
intro: Veronica austriaca var. tenuifolia, also known as Austrian speedwell, is a perennial herb plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Veronica austriaca var. tenuifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine for its expectorant properties.
